examples.text: الْبَحِيرَةُ عَمِيقَةٌ جِدًّا وَتَحْتَوِي عَلَى الْكَثِيرِ مِن الْأَسْمَاكِ الْجَمِيلَةِ.
examples.english: The lake is very deep and contains many beautiful fish.

etymology.text: فَعِيل (faʕīl)-type stative-verb derived from the active participle from the verb عَمُقَ (ʕamuqa, “to be deep”). Compare to Aramaic עַמִּיקָא (ʕammīqā).
